dialogos.texto_en: The sea!
The sea!
The beautiful Churaumi sea!!
Why are you shouting...?
Futaro-kun?\nYou're too energetic, don't you think?
It'd be a waste to not put my all into having fun!\nLet's get pumped!!
Okay, just calm down a bit.\nIt's really embarrassing.
The bright blue sky, the emerald green sea.\nIt's just like a painting!\nWe're so lucky that it's sunny today!
The sand is so white and beautiful.\nIt looks like it's sparkling.
That's so true.\nIt really feels like we're really in Okinawa.
Oh, speaking of which, I heard from a photographer\nat work that, because the water is shallow here\nthis beach is good for underwater photography.
Underwater photography?\nYou mean taking pictures in the water?
Ohh, that sounds nice.\nIt'd be great on social media,\nlet's all take some later!
The waves aren't too high,\nso it'll be safe for Raiha-chan too.
The facilities for tourists are also well-equipped.\nYou found a great spot.
Ehehe, I'm so glad you guys are happy.\nI worked hard to find this place.
Well then, shall we do some beach activities first?
That's a good idea, but look at how beautiful\nthe sea is, and it's right there.\nShouldn't we go for a swim first?
Why?
Well. My body is still a bit sleepy, \nso I think I'd like to relax and let the waves\nwash over my feet for a bit.
Oh, I see\nThat's a good point.
Alright then, let's go for a swim first!
*sigh*
Yotsuba?
Oh, Uesugi-san.\nAren't you going to swim with everyone else?
It's too bad your plans got changed.
Ah, no it's ok... \nI'm just getting ahead of myself.
After all, we came to the beach,\nso swimming might be more fun for everyone\nthan doing activities right away, right?
Well, I guess I do \nfeel a little sorry about \nnot realizing that sooner!
(She's still the same, always thinking about others\n before herself. It's not something\n that can change easily.)
There's no reason to feel embarrassed.
What do you mean?
Ichika and them were the ones who\nchanged the plans, didn't they?\nSo there's no reason for you to be so down about it.
I suppose so, but...\nI wonder if I didn't plan as much as I should have.
Even so, there's no point in worrying about it.\nLet's think positive and move on.
Yeah, you're right.
All right!\nThen let's get in there too.\nIt'd be a waste to just watch, right?
That's right!\nIt'd be disrespectful to the ocean\nnot to swim in it!
I was looking forward to the activities, too.\nI've never done anything like what you had\nplanned before.
Really?
I never even thought about going to the beach\nto enjoy myself until I met you guys.
So, please show me how to have \nfun on the beach the right way.\nI'm counting on you.
Of course!\nLeave it to me,\nI'll teach you step by step.
All right!\nThen let's get in there too.\nIt'd be a waste to just watch, right?
That's right!\nIt'd be disrespectful to the ocean\nnot to swim in it!
This is just how things go on a trip.\nIt's common for plans to change\nin the heat of the moment.
No matter how perfectly one's planned,\nit can't beat how everyone feels in the moment.
But Uesugi-san, you're the type to plan your trips\nmeticulously, aren't you?
That's...true.
Well, that's why I understand.\nThere were countless times with you guys\nwhere things didn't go as planned, you know?
WHAT?!\nI don't have anything to say to that!
Plans are just plans, aren't they?\nYou can think of this as a little ad-libbing.
Ehehe, I guess you're right.\n...Thank you.
All right!\nThen let's get in there too.\nIt'd be a waste to just watch, right?
That's right!\nIt'd be disrespectful to the ocean\nnot to swim in it!
Alright Uesugi-san, you're on!\nIt's a race!
What now?!
Ahahaha!\nReady, GO!
